name: Le Scaphandrier
description: Porte un vieux scaphandre spatial blindé, hors d'usage mais blindé de plaques supplémentaires. Il ouvre les sas à la masse. Pas besoin de finesse quand on a un marteau orbital.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk heavy infantry in old bulky spacesuit reinforced with welded armor plates, wielding a massive sledgehammer, cracked visor with duct tape repairs, breaching an airlock door, sparks and atmosphere venting, highly detailed
